message:
Improve diagnostic warnings with field names and helpful hints

Add field names to diagnostic messages in TQL evaluation and record
operations. Include helpful hints to guide users toward fixes, such as
suggesting null checks or providing fallback values.

Addresses: TNZ-213

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,17 +15,20 @@ warning: expected `bool`, but got `null`
 3 |   "false_if_null": false if null,
   |                             ~~~~ 
   |
+  = hint: the result of this expression is `null`
 
 warning: expected `bool`, but got `null`
  --> tests/language/binop/if.tql:6:27
   |
 6 |   "null_if_null": null if null,
   |                           ~~~~ 
   |
+  = hint: the result of this expression is `null`
 
 warning: expected `bool`, but got `null`
  --> tests/language/binop/if.tql:9:27
   |
 9 |   "true_if_null": true if null,
   |                           ~~~~ 
   |
+  = hint: the result of this expression is `null`

@@ -35,6 +35,7 @@ warning: binary operator `add` not implemented for `string` and `int64`

    |       ~~~~~~~~~ 
    |
+   = hint: the result of this expression is `null`
 
 warning: integer overflow
   --> tests/language/expr/add.tql:15:7

 16 | x13 = null + 1
    |       ~~~~~~~~ 
    |
+   = hint: the result of this expression is `null`

@@ -35,13 +35,15 @@ warning: binary operator `gt` not implemented for `string` and `int64`

+   = hint: the result of this expression is `null`

   --> tests/language/lambda/where.tql:11:30

    |                              ~~~~~ 
    |
+   = hint: the result of this expression is `null`
 
 warning: expected `list`, got `string`
   --> tests/language/lambda/where.tql:11:6
